graphic.title: Echo Festival
graphic.overview: A vibrant festival poster design that captures the energy and excitement of the Echo Festival.

process.title: Research & Concept
process.description: Researched festival themes, audience demographics, and visual trends. Developed initial mood boards and color palettes to match the festival's energy.

process.title: Design Iteration
process.description: Created multiple poster variations with different typography treatments and layouts. Tested color combinations and visual hierarchy.

process.title: Refinement
process.description: Refined the winning design based on feedback. Enhanced typography, adjusted spacing, and optimized for both digital and print formats.

graphic.title: Mori Studio
graphic.overview: A comprehensive brand identity system for a modern design studio including logo, color palette, and brand guidelines.

process.title: Brand Strategy
process.description: Conducted stakeholder interviews and competitor analysis. Defined brand values, mission, and target audience.

process.title: Logo Design
process.description: Explored 50+ logo concepts focusing on minimalism and elegance. Tested logos across different scales and applications.

process.title: Brand System
process.description: Created comprehensive brand guidelines including typography, color system, imagery style, and usage patterns.

graphic.title: Issue No.12
graphic.overview: A quarterly magazine publication featuring compelling editorial design and sophisticated typography.

process.title: Content Planning
process.description: Reviewed editorial content and developed a clear information hierarchy. Created wireframes for all page templates.

process.title: Layout Design
process.description: Designed page layouts with focus on readability and visual balance. Developed modular system for consistent design.

process.title: Final Production
process.description: Prepared files for print production. Optimized typography and ensured color accuracy across all pages.

graphic.title: Drift Campaign
graphic.overview: A comprehensive marketing campaign with consistent visual language across multiple touchpoints.

process.title: Campaign Concept
process.description: Developed campaign theme and key messaging. Created visual mood boards for the entire campaign.

process.title: Asset Creation
process.description: Designed all campaign assets including social media graphics, banners, and promotional materials.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Ensured consistent application across all channels. Optimized assets for various platforms and screen sizes.

graphic.title: Type Specimen
graphic.overview: A complete typeface family specimen book showcasing a custom-designed font with multiple weights and styles.

process.title: Typeface Concept
process.description: Defined typeface personality and design principles. Sketched initial letterforms and established baseline system.

process.title: Glyph Development
process.description: Drew and refined individual glyphs for consistency. Created multiple weights and styles for the typeface family.

process.title: Specimen Design
process.description: Created comprehensive specimen book showcasing the typeface in real-world applications.

graphic.title: Nocturne LP
graphic.overview: A complete album package design including cover art, booklet, and digital artwork for a music release.

process.title: Concept Development
process.description: Listened to the album and developed visual concepts that reflect the music's mood and themes.

process.title: Cover Design
process.description: Created striking cover artwork with typography and imagery that captures the album's essence.

process.title: Package Design
process.description: Designed complete packaging including booklet layout, back cover, and disc artwork.

3d.title: Sphere Study
3d.overview: A detailed study in 3D rendering focusing on material properties, lighting, and photorealism.

process.title: Modeling
process.description: Created base sphere geometry and applied high-poly subdivisions for smooth surfaces.

process.title: Material Creation
process.description: Developed realistic material shaders with proper roughness, metallic, and reflection properties.

process.title: Lighting & Rendering
process.description: Set up 3-point lighting setup and rendered with Cycles for photorealistic output.

3d.title: Sand Pavilion
3d.overview: A stunning architectural visualization of a modern pavilion design with landscape integration.

process.title: Architectural Modeling
process.description: Built detailed 3D model of the pavilion structure based on architectural plans.

process.title: Environment Design
process.description: Created surrounding landscape, terrain, and vegetation for context.

process.title: Lighting & Rendering
process.description: Applied realistic lighting to show the design in different times of day and rendered final images.

3d.title: Crystal 01
3d.overview: An artistic exploration of crystalline structures using advanced materials and rendering techniques.

process.title: Geometry Sculpting
process.description: Sculpted organic crystal shapes with attention to natural geometric patterns.

process.title: Material Development
process.description: Created translucent glass materials with proper refraction and light dispersion.

process.title: Final Render
process.description: Rendered with volumetric lighting to showcase the crystal's transparency and internal light play.

3d.title: Dusk Set
3d.overview: A cinematic composition combining multiple 3D elements with dramatic lighting during sunset.

process.title: Scene Composition
process.description: Arranged 3D models and props to create dynamic composition with strong visual flow.

process.title: Lighting Design
process.description: Implemented sunset lighting with warm tones and dramatic shadows for cinematic feel.

process.title: Post-Production
process.description: Enhanced final render with color grading and subtle effects in post-production.

3d.title: Inflate Type
3d.overview: Playful 3D typography exploring inflatable balloon aesthetics and fluid dynamics.

process.title: Type Modeling
process.description: Modeled 3D typeface geometry and applied soft body simulation for inflatable effect.

process.title: Material & Shading
process.description: Created glossy balloon materials with specular highlights and proper light reflection.

process.title: Animation & Rendering
process.description: Rendered multiple frames showing the inflatable type in motion and final static composition.

3d.title: Moss Study
3d.overview: A detailed study in creating realistic organic surface textures with procedural methods.

process.title: Texture Baking
process.description: Created high-poly moss geometry and baked textures for detail preservation.

process.title: Shader Network
process.description: Built complex shader network combining multiple textures for realistic moss appearance.

process.title: Final Render
process.description: Rendered with subsurface scattering to show organic light transmission through moss.

animation.title: Spin Cycle
animation.overview: A mesmerizing looping animation featuring rotating geometric shapes with smooth easing.

process.title: Concept & Storyboard
process.description: Sketched animation concepts and created visual storyboards for the loop animation.

process.title: Animation
process.description: Animated geometric shapes with careful easing curves for smooth, natural motion.

process.title: Effects & Rendering
process.description: Added particle effects and motion blur for enhanced visual polish.

animation.title: Rise Logo
animation.overview: A dynamic logo animation with bouncy physics and smooth transitions perfect for branding.

process.title: Logo Design
process.description: Designed the logo and prepared all assets for animation in layered format.

process.title: Animation
process.description: Created bounce animation using physics-based easing. Built smooth entrance and exit sequences.

process.title: Polish
process.description: Added subtle details like glows and shadows to enhance the animation.

animation.title: Flow/Type
animation.overview: Expressive kinetic typography with fluid motion bringing text to life.

process.title: Typography
process.description: Selected and styled typeface to support the motion design concept.

process.title: Motion Design
process.description: Animated individual letters with flowing, organic motion paths.

process.title: Sound Design
process.description: Synced animation with audio for a cohesive audiovisual experience.

animation.title: Pulse
animation.overview: An abstract animation exploring rhythm and repetition with hypnotic pulsing elements.

process.title: Concept Development
process.description: Explored abstract concepts and created multiple visual variations.

process.title: Animation
process.description: Created rhythmic pulsing animations synced to an underlying beat.

process.title: Color & Effects
process.description: Applied color grading and effects to enhance the hypnotic quality.

animation.title: Ember
animation.overview: A beautiful particle animation creating the effect of floating embers and magical particles.

process.title: Particle System
process.description: Built custom particle system with careful velocity and lifetime settings.

process.title: Physics
process.description: Applied gravity and air resistance for realistic floating behavior.

process.title: Lighting
process.description: Added glows and lighting effects to make particles feel luminous and magical.

animation.title: Plus Loop
animation.overview: A simple yet elegant animation of a plus symbol rotating and transforming in a seamless loop.

process.title: Shape Design
process.description: Created geometric plus shape with precise proportions for animation.

process.title: Looping Animation
process.description: Built seamless loop animation with smooth rotation and scaling.

process.title: Timing
process.description: Fine-tuned animation timing for perfect loop point and natural motion flow.
